8. ~? [X0] : (leads(rstrong,X0) & stable(X0)) [negated conjecture 7]
12. ! [X0] : (~leads(rstrong,X0) | ~stable(X0)) [ennf transformation 8]

14. leads(rstrong,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 2]
25. ~leads(rstrong,X0) | ~stable(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
26. ~stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 14,25]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,13]
% SZS output end Proof for positive.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
